description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a sport-inspired, casual tee which won't let you down in either style or performance, then your search is over! This T-shirt from nike has an off duty approach, just what you need to perfect your effortlessly fashionable casual look.Product DetailsBlack KNVB T-shirt, has polo neck with two button placket, short sleeves, Nike swoosh on the right chest and KNVB logo on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm ironSize and FitRegular fit
